mapper.insert: insert into activity_comment ( activity_id, user_id, content, like_count, is_deleted ) values ( #{activityId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{likeCount}, #{isDeleted} )
mapper.select: select id, activity_id, user_id, content, like_count, is_deleted, create_time, update_time from activity_comment where id = #{commentId} limit 1

select c.id, c.activity_id, c.user_id, u.username, u.real_name, c.content, c.like_count, case when l.id is null then false else true end as liked, c.create_time from activity_comment c left join sys_user u on c.user_id = u.id left join activity_comment_like l on c.id = l.comment_id and l.user_id = #{currentUserId} and l.status = 1 where c.activity_id = #{activityId} and c.is_deleted = 0 order by c.id desc
select id, comment_id, user_id, status, create_time, update_time from activity_comment_like where comment_id = #{commentId} and user_id = #{userId} limit 1
mapper.update: update activity_comment set like_count = like_count + 1, update_time = now() where id = #{commentId} and is_deleted = 0
update activity_comment set like_count = case when like_count > 0 then like_count - 1 else 0 end, update_time = now() where id = #{commentId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select id, activity_id, user_id, status, create_time, update_time from activity_favorite where activity_id = #{activityId} and user_id = #{userId} limit 1

select f.id as favorite_id, a.id as activity_id, a.title as activity_title, a.cover_url, a.location, a.status, a.audit_status, a.activity_start_time, a.activity_end_time, f.create_time from activity_favorite f left join activity a on f.activity_id = a.id where f.user_id = #{userId} and f.status = 1 and a.is_deleted = 0 order by f.id desc
